## Palantir stock down 35% from peak — coverage assesses H2 2026 outlook for the AI software leader

A 35% drawdown in a core AI software thesis name invites position sizing review, but without a new catalyst this is valuation-dislocation context only; PM should track whether any H2 2026 contract or government-deal catalysts are approaching before adding.

- PLTR has pulled back from its peak by 35%
- Coverage is evaluating the H2 2026 investment case without citing a new business catalyst
- Framing as 'AI software leader' signals PLTR's thesis remains enterprise AI adoption
- Medium classifier confidence; no earnings event or contract announcement underlying the coverage
- Buy-the-dip framing similar to other drawdown pieces in today's tape
